evals.prompt: Show me all VMs that are powered off and how much memory each has
evals.expected_output: Filtered VM list with power state and memory
expectations: Results include memory_mb for each VM
Does NOT attempt any write operations

evals.prompt: Are there any critical alarms? If so, what should I do about them?
expectations: Uses get_alarms to retrieve active alarms
Routes user to vmware-aiops for remediation if needed

evals.prompt: Give me a health report of host esxi-02 including hardware status
evals.expected_output: Host details with CPU, memory, version, uptime
expectations: Uses list_esxi_hosts or vm_info for host details
Presents information in a readable format
